final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: e-commerce promotional poster
Asset type: 618 anniversary campaign announcement poster for social media and e-commerce platforms
Primary request: bold announcement poster for UGREEN NAS private cloud brand 618 anniversary celebration
Scene/backdrop: clean gradient background with subtle tech-inspired geometric patterns, floating product silhouettes
Subject: UGREEN NAS private cloud device as hero product, sleek modern design with soft product glow
Style/medium: digital illustration with 3D product rendering, commercial advertising style
Composition/framing: centered product focus with balanced negative space, vertical poster format
Lighting/mood: soft studio lighting with rim light on product, celebratory and premium mood
Color palette: brand green (#00A651) as primary + white + subtle gold accents for anniversary celebration
Materials/textures: matte metallic product finish, smooth gradient background, subtle particle effects
Text (verbatim): "绿联私有云品牌618周年庆活动"
Constraints: keep brand green as dominant color, maintain clean readable layout for e-commerce display
Avoid: cluttered composition, clashing colors, low contrast text, generic stock imagery
